text: Sigra Marg mein bahut gehre gadde hain, baarish mein paani bhar jaata hai aur gaadiyaan kharaab ho jaati hain.
The road on Sigra Marg is completely broken with large potholes. During rain it becomes a pond.
Sigra Marg ke gadde itne bade hain ki do pahiye ki gaadi bhi girr jaati hai, koi nahi sunta.
Waterlogging on Sigra Marg every monsoon. The road surface is badly damaged with craters.
Hamare ward 4 mein Sigra Marg par gadde bahut hain. Bahut logo ki durghatna ho chuki hai.
Government Primary School Sigra ki chhat titk rahi hai, baarish mein paani andar aata hai.
The roof of Government Primary School in Sigra is leaking badly. Children study under dripping water.
Sigra school building bahut purana hai, chhat ka plaster gir raha hai, bacchon ka life khatre mein hai.
School mein 612 bacche hain lekin sirf 440 ki jagah hai. Teacher bhi sirf 8 hain. Bahut problem hai.
Govt primary school Sigra has severe overcrowding - 612 students for 440 capacity. Roof also leaking.
Bhelupur mein nali bahut kharaab hai, baarish ke time poora mohalla doob jaata hai.
Drainage overflow in Bhelupur area. Every monsoon our homes get flooded up to knee level.
Bhelupur ki naali band pad gayi hai, sewer ka paani sadak par aata hai.
Monsoon flooding in Bhelupur is terrible. The drainage system is completely blocked.
Ward 11 Bhelupur mein har baarish mein sadak par paani bhar jaata hai. Koi nahi sunta.
Nadesar area mein paani ki supply bahut kam hai. Roz do ghante bhi nahi milta paani.
Water supply in Nadesar colony is very irregular. We get water for only 30 minutes daily.
Hamare ghar mein teen din se paani nahi aaya. Nadesar mein paani ki bahut takleef hai.
Cantonment area Nadesar - daily water shortage. Pipeline is old and broken.
Ward 15 mein paani ki samasya bahut purani hai. Jal jeevan mission ka paisa kahan gaya?
Orderly Bazaar mein raat ko andhaira rehta hai. Streetlight nahi hai, crime ka darr rehta hai.
No streetlights in Orderly Bazaar area. It is very dark and unsafe after 7 PM.
Sadar Bazaar se Orderly Bazaar jaane wali sadak mein koi light nahi. Bahut andhera rehta hai.
Streetlights broken for 3 months in Orderly Bazaar. Women are afraid to go out at night.
Paharia health centre mein dawa nahi milti. Doctor bhi aksar absent rehte hain.
Paharia Primary Health Centre has chronic medicine shortage. Patients are turned away daily.
Ward 18 PHC mein BP aur diabetes ki dawa mahino se nahi hai. Meri maa ko private se khareedna pad raha hai.
Medicine shortage at Paharia health centre is chronic. Basic antibiotics not available.
Pandeypur ki ladkiyon ke school mein shauchalay kharaab hai, girls padh nahi paa rahi.
Girls school in Pandeypur has no functional toilets. Students are dropping out because of this.
Pandeypur school mein toilet nahi hai. Teen saal se complaint kar rahe hain, koi action nahi.
Sigra area mein footpath par dukaan walon ne kabja kar liya hai. Pedestrians road par chalte hain.
Footpath encroachment on Sigra road. Shopkeepers have taken over entire footpath, pedestrians in danger.
Bhelupur anganwadi ki building ka plaster gir raha hai. Chhote bacchon ke liye bahut khatarnaak hai.
Anganwadi in Bhelupur has severe structural damage. The building may collapse.
Shivpur park mein ghaas itni badi hai ki saamp ka darr rehta hai. Bacche khel nahi sakte.
Shivpur park is completely overgrown and unsafe. Snakes have been spotted there.
Pandeypur community hall ki chhat se baarish mein paani tapakta hai. Hall use nahi ho sakta.
Pandeypur community hall roof is leaking badly. All community events are cancelled.
Sigra Marg par sadak ki halat bahut kharaab hai, gaadiya toot jaati hain.
Potholes on Sigra road have damaged my vehicle's suspension. Need immediate repair.
Sigra road mein baarish ke baad paani nahi nikalta, kaafi time tak jama rehta hai.
Ward 7 school building bahut kharaab hai. Bacche darr ke baithte hain chhat ke neeche.
Primary school in Sigra cantonment area needs urgent roof repair. Monsoon is approaching.
Bhelupur mein naali ki problem bahut gambheer hai. Poore mohalle mein badboo aati hai.
The drainage problem in Bhelupur is causing health issues. The area smells terrible.
Chetganj area mein paani ki tanki khali rehti hai, aadha din paani nahi milta.
Water tank in Chetganj is always empty. We barely get water for 2 hours a week.
Sadar Bazaar ke roads mein potholes hain. Auto aur rickshaw wale extra charge lete hain.
Road in Sadar Bazaar cantonment area has major potholes. It needs resurfacing urgently.
Nadesar colony mein nali ka paani sadak par aata hai. Bahut gandhagi hai.
Sewage overflow in Nadesar colony. The smell is unbearable and people are getting sick.
Ward 18 mein hospital door hai, local PHC mein koi sahi doctor nahi aata.
People in Ward 18 have to travel far for healthcare. The local health centre is inadequate.
Pandeypur ke bacchon ke liye khelne ki jagah nahi hai. Park mein ghaas hai, koi suvidha nahi.
No playground facilities in Pandeypur. Children play on busy roads because park is not maintained.
Orderly Bazaar mein bijli ka wire bahut purana hai, leakage ka darr hai.
Electrical wires in Orderly Bazaar are old and dangerous. Fire hazard risk is high.
Sigra Marg ki road bilkul kharaab ho gayi hai. Ambulance bhi mushkil se jaati hai.
Sigra road damage is so bad even ambulances have difficulty passing. Emergency repairs needed.
Bhelupur school mein bhi paani ki problem hai, peeney ka paani nahi aata.
Drinking water not available at Bhelupur school. Students bring water from home.
Paharia PHC mein OPD band ho jaata hai 11 baje hi. Doctor time par nahi aate.
Paharia PHC doctors are irregular. OPD closes by 11 AM. Patients suffer.
Pandeypur mein sarkari zameen par kuch log kabza kar rahe hain, police bhi nahi suni.
Land encroachment on government property in Pandeypur. Police haven't taken action.
Sigra marg ka kaam kai baar shuru hua lekin kabhi pura nahi hua.
Road repair on Sigra Marg started many times but never completed. Money wasted.
Ward 7 ke government school mein teacher ki kami hai. Ek teacher teen class padhata hai.
Teacher shortage at government school Ward 7. One teacher handling 3 classes simultaneously.
Bhelupur naali ki safai pichle saal se nahi hui. Mushrooms ug aaye hain.
Drainage in Bhelupur not cleaned for over a year. Mosquito breeding is rampant.
Chetganj mein paani ki pipe phat gayi hai, sadak par paani beh raha hai.
Water pipeline burst in Chetganj area. Water flowing on road for 3 days. No repair.
Pandeypur community hall bahut purani building hai. Dawaazan bhi toot gaye hain.
Pandeypur community hall is in dilapidated condition. Doors and windows broken.
Orderly Bazaar ke streetlight kab se kharaab hain. Ek hafte mein teen purse chhine hain.
Three purse snatchings in Orderly Bazaar this week due to broken streetlights.
Shivpur park mein shaam ke baad kutte ka jhund hota hai. Bacchon ko kaat liya.
Stray dog menace in Shivpur park. A child was bitten last week. Park is unsafe.
Bhelupur anganwadi mein khana bhi nahi milta sahi se. Poshan ka kaam ruk gaya hai.
Bhelupur anganwadi nutrition program has stopped. Children are not receiving mid-day meals.
Nadesar area mein bijli roz jaati hai, load shedding bahut zyada hai.
Frequent power cuts in Nadesar area, sometimes 8 hours without electricity.
Sigra school ke bachche ki baarish mein bheegte hain kyunki chhat se paani tapakta hai.
Children in Sigra school get drenched because of roof leaks. Urgent repair needed.
Paharia mein ambulance nahi aati, apne wahan se travel karna pad ta hai BHU.
No ambulance service available in Paharia. Patients have to go to BHU by private vehicle.
Pandeypur mein girls school ke toilet ki deewar gir gayi hai. Khule mein jana pad ta hai.
Toilet wall collapsed at Pandeypur girls school. Students have no privacy facilities.
Ward 4 mein footpath par thele walon ka kabja hai, pedestrian road par chalte hain.
Street vendors blocking footpaths in Ward 4 Sigra area. Pedestrian safety at risk.
Bhelupur mein naali ki safai nahi hui. Dengue ke case bad rahe hain.
No drain cleaning in Bhelupur for months. Dengue and malaria cases are rising.
Chetganj area mein paani ki kami hai. Tanker bhi nahi aata. Hum preshaan hain.
Water scarcity in Chetganj. No tanker supply either. Residents buying water.
Orderly Bazaar mein bijli ka pole gira hua hai. Accident ho sakta hai.
A fallen electricity pole in Orderly Bazaar is a serious accident risk. Urgent attention needed.
Sigra school mein midday meal nahi milta sahi se. Khana thanda aata hai ya aata hi nahi.
Mid-day meal not served properly at Sigra school. Children going hungry.
Bhelupur naali overflow se mere ghar mein paani ghus aaya. Saman kharaab ho gaya.
Drainage overflow entered my house in Bhelupur. All household goods damaged.
Paharia PHC ki building kharaab hai. Mrizaon ko bahar baithhna padta hai.
PHC building in Paharia is in poor condition. Patients wait outside due to lack of space.
Shivpur mein park mein baithne ki jagah nahi, bench toot gaye hain sab.
All benches in Shivpur park are broken. Elderly cannot sit there.
Pandeypur anganwadi mein bhi paani nahi aata. Bacchon ko saaf paani nahi milta.
No clean water supply at Pandeypur anganwadi. Children's health at risk.
Kabirchaura area mein road ka kaam adha chhod diya. Bahut dikkat ho rahi hai.
Road work abandoned midway in Kabirchaura area. Creates traffic jam every day.
Sigra marg par raat ko koi police nahi aati. Crime bad raha hai.
No police patrolling on Sigra Marg at night. Crime is increasing.
Ward 11 Bhelupur mein dengue se 5 log beemar pad gaye hain. Sarkaar kuch nahi karti.
Dengue outbreak in Bhelupur Ward 11. 5 confirmed cases this week. No health response.
Nadesar mein aangan badi nahi chal rahi. Bachche ghar mein baithe hain.
Anganwadi center in Nadesar Ward 15 has been closed for weeks. No notification given.
Sigra road ke gadde mein ek aadmi ka accident ho gaya. Haath toot gaya uska.
A man fractured his hand after falling into a pothole on Sigra Marg. Immediate repair needed.
Ward 7 Sigra school ki library mein kitab nahi hain. Bacche padh nahi sakte.
Library at Sigra school has no books. Children have nothing to read.
Bhelupur area mein malaria ka outbreak hai. Fogging nahi ki sarkar ne.
Malaria outbreak in Bhelupur. Government has not done any fogging or preventive measures.
Chetganj mein bijli ka meter bahut zyada bill dikha raha hai, current chori ho rahi hai.
Electricity theft in Chetganj area causing high bills for honest consumers.
Pandeypur mein kachra collection nahi hota. Sadak par kachra ka dher hai.
Garbage collection stopped in Pandeypur. Waste piled on streets for weeks.
Shivpur mein paani log zameen se khod ke nikalte hain. Municipality ki supply nahi aati.
Residents of Shivpur dig borewells as municipal supply is non-existent. Water quality issue.
Orderly Bazaar mein transformer jalaa hua hai, do din se bijli nahi.
Transformer burned down in Orderly Bazaar. No electricity for 2 days. Urgent replacement needed.
Sigra area mein CCTV nahi hain, bag chhinayi ke bahut case aa rahe hain.
No CCTV cameras in Sigra area. Bag snatching incidents increasing every week.
Bhelupur mein anganwadi building mein chathe ka plaster gir gaya. Bacche khatare mein hain.
Ceiling plaster fell in Bhelupur anganwadi center. Children's safety is at serious risk.
Nadesar park bhi unkempt hai. Families nahi jaati wahan.
Nadesar park is poorly maintained. Families avoid it. Needs renovation urgently.
Paharia ke logon ko hospital ke liye 8 km jaana padta hai. Road bhi kharaab hai.
Paharia residents travel 8km to hospital on bad roads. Seriously ill patients suffer.
Ward 15 mein school mein shauchalaya nahi hai. Bacchi school nahi aati.
No toilet facility at school in Nadesar Ward 15. Girl students stopping attendance.
Sigra road par ek mahina pehle kaam shuru hua tha lekin ab bandh hai. Gadde waise ke waise hain.
Road work on Sigra Marg halted after one week. Potholes remain unfilled.
Bhelupur ka flooding problem har saal aaata hai. Koi permanent solution nahi.
Bhelupur flooding is an annual problem with no permanent solution. Same issue every monsoon.
Cantonment area mein sewer line bahut purani hai. Leakage ho raha hai andar hi.
Old sewer lines in Cantonment area leaking underground. Ground sinking in spots.
Paharia mein maa aur bachche ka teeka nahi lagaa. Anganwadi worker nahi aati.
Vaccination for mother and child not happening in Paharia. Anganwadi worker absent.
Sigra bazaar ke karib road par ek bada gadda hai. Cycle aur bike walon ke liye bahut dangerous.
Huge pothole near Sigra bazaar is dangerous for cyclists and two-wheelers.
Ward 22 mein community hall mein baarish mein baith nahi sakte. Meetings cancel ho jaati hain.
Ward 22 community hall unusable due to roof leak. Important community meetings cancelled.
Bhelupur ke kuch ghar mein paani aaya flood se. Furniture kharaab ho gaya.
Homes flooded in Bhelupur during last week's rain. Furniture and electronics damaged.
Nadesar mein gali ki naali bahut narrow hai aur band pad gayi hai.
Narrow drain in Nadesar lane is completely blocked. Requires urgent desilting.
Orderly Bazaar mein peeney ka paani contaminated ho gaya hai. Logo ko loose motion ho raha hai.
Drinking water contamination in Orderly Bazaar. Multiple cases of diarrhea reported.
Shivpur mein road par raat ko aandhera rehta hai kyunki streetlight nahi hai.
Complete darkness on Shivpur road at night. No streetlights installed.
Ward 7 school mein computer lab nahi hai. Aaj ke zamane mein technology ki zaroorat hai.
No computer lab in Ward 7 government school. Children have no digital literacy access.
Pandeypur mein anganwadi mein doodh aur kela nahi milta. Poshan abhi bhi khatam hai.
Nutrition items like milk and banana not distributed at Pandeypur anganwadi.
Sigra marg ki baarish waali problem ke baare mein kai baar complaint ki. Kuch nahi hua.
Repeated complaints about waterlogging on Sigra Marg ignored by authorities.
Bhelupur ke naale ki gandagi se machhar bahut ho gaye hain.
Mosquito infestation in Bhelupur due to clogged drains. Malaria risk is high.
Paharia aur shivpur ke beech ki sadak puri tarah ukhad gayi hai.
Road between Paharia and Shivpur completely damaged. Needs full reconstruction.
Lohta mein paani ki tanki ka dhakkan nahi hai. Gandhagi ja rahi hai paani mein.
Open water tank in Lohta Ward 22. No lid. Contamination risk from birds and insects.
Sigra mein raat ko bijli bahut zyada jaati hai. Generator khareedna pad raha hai.
Frequent power cuts in Sigra area at night. Residents buying costly generators.
Ward 7 school mein drinking water nahi hai. Bacche paas ki dukaan se kharidke laate hain.
School children in Ward 7 buying drinking water from shops due to no tap water supply.
Pandeypur mein ek boodha aadmi gir gaya raat ko andhere mein. Koi light nahi tha.
Elderly man fell at night in Pandeypur due to no street lighting. Suffered injuries.
Bhelupur mein ek bada nala overflow karke kucch ghar mein ghus gaya.
Large drain overflowed in Bhelupur and water entered several homes.
Sigra marg ki road itni kharaab hai ki e-rickshaw chal nahi paata.
Sigra Marg road so damaged that e-rickshaws cannot operate. Economic impact severe.
Nadesar ke locality mein CCTV camera nahi hai. Mohalle mein crime bad raha hai.
No CCTV in Nadesar area. Crime increasing and residents feel unsafe.
Shivpur mein anganwadi band hai. Garbhwati mahila ko kahin se bhi sahayata nahi mil rahi.
Anganwadi in Shivpur Ward 18 is closed. Pregnant women receive no nutritional support.
Orderly Bazaar mein transformer ki jagah nahi hai. Pole ke paas baithna khatra hai.
No safe transformer placement in Orderly Bazaar. Electric pole poses danger to public.
Bhelupur ke bacche school se bhaag rahe hain kyunki flooding ki wajah se path mein paani hai.
Students skipping school in Bhelupur because the path floods during rains.
Chetganj mein gharon ke saamne road ki gutter nahi hai, sadak par paani aata hai.
No road gutters in front of houses in Chetganj. Rainwater pools on road and enters homes.
Paharia mein bijli ka pole girne wala hai. Log darr rahe hain.
Electricity pole about to collapse in Paharia. Residents are scared to walk past it.
Ward 4 Sigra mein road ke kinare drainage nahi hai, baarish mein sab taraf paani hi paani.
No roadside drainage in Sigra Ward 4. Rain causes severe waterlogging everywhere.
Pandeypur mein garbage truck teen hafton se nahi aaya. Badbu aa rahi hai.
Garbage truck not collected waste in Pandeypur for 3 weeks. Stench unbearable.
Lohta mein school mein chair nahi hai, bacche zameen par baithte hain.
No chairs in Lohta school. Students sit on the floor in all classes.
Sigra mein road accident badhte ja rahe hain. Speed breaker banana chahiye.
Road accidents increasing in Sigra. Need speed breakers and proper signage.
Bhelupur mein paani ki buri quality hai, bahut log beemar pad rahe hain.
Poor water quality in Bhelupur. Many residents falling ill with waterborne diseases.
Shivpur road bohot kharaab hai. Cycle chalana mushkil ho gaya hai.
Shivpur road condition deteriorated badly. Even cycling is dangerous.
Orderly Bazaar mein paani ki line mein jo valve hai wo kharaab ho gaya hai.
Water supply valve broken in Orderly Bazaar. Water wasted and colony has no supply.
Pandeypur ke park mein koi light nahi hai raat ko. Asocl ho gaya hai wahan.
Park in Pandeypur has no lighting at night. It is now occupied by antisocial elements.
Nadesar mein ek aurat ka purse chhina. Cctv na hone ki wajah se pakad nahi saka koi.
Woman's purse snatched in Nadesar. No CCTV meant perpetrator escaped.
Sigra marg par daang mein girr ke ek bachcha toot gaya. Koi action nahi.
Child fell into pothole on Sigra Marg and got injured. No action taken by authorities.
Kabirchaura mein sewer line mein leakage hai. Sadak mein gandgi beh rahi hai.
Sewer line leaking in Kabirchaura area. Sewage flowing on the main road.
Paharia mein TB ki dawa nahi milti. Mujhe shaharchhar jana padta hai.
TB medications not available at Paharia PHC. Patients travel long distances for treatment.
Sigra School mein ek bhi pankha nahi chal raha. Bacche garmi mein padh nahi paa rahe.
No fans working in Sigra school. Children unable to study in the summer heat.
Bhelupur ka flooding problem sirf naali ka nahi, dekhenge to pura system hi kharaab hai.
Bhelupur flooding problem is systemic - the entire drainage network needs overhaul.
Lohta area mein anganwadi worker 15 din se nahi aayi. Bacchon ka tika nahi hua.
Anganwadi worker absent for 15 days in Lohta area. Child vaccinations delayed.
Ward 15 chetganj mein road ki buri halat hai. Ek buzurg mahila girr gayi.
Elderly woman fell on broken road in Chetganj Ward 15. Road repair is urgent.
Orderly bazaar mein chhat ke upar paani jam jaata hai, seepage aa raha hai neeche.
Roof water accumulates in Orderly Bazaar. Seepage causing damage to lower floors.
Shivpur mein ek mahina pehle road par kaam shuru hua tha. Aadha chhod ke chale gaye.
Road construction in Shivpur started a month ago and abandoned halfway. Worse than before.
Nadesar locality mein CCTV camera lagane ki zaroorat hai. Crime bad raha hai.
Urgent need for CCTV installation in Nadesar locality. Multiple thefts this month.
Pandeypur mein ladies toilet nahi hai public jagah par. Mahilaon ko bahut mushkil hoti hai.
No public toilet for women in Pandeypur. A serious issue for women's dignity and health.
Paharia mein baarish mein road doob jaati hai. Hospital jaane ka rasta band ho jaata hai.
Road to hospital in Paharia gets flooded during rains. Medical emergencies are dangerous.
Bhelupur mein ek anganwadi hai jo puri tarah se band pad gayi hai.
One anganwadi center in Bhelupur is completely shut down. Children deprived of services.
Sigra road par teen mahine mein koi kaam nahi hua. Gadde badde ho gaye.
No repair work done on Sigra Marg road for 3 months. Potholes growing bigger.
Ward 11 Bhelupur mein drainage overflow hota hai, log ooth ke jaate hain.
Bhelupur Ward 11 drainage overflow forces residents to leave homes annually.
Nadesar locality mein paani ka meter nahi laga kuch logo ke ghar mein, phir bhi bill aata hai.
Nadesar residents billed for water despite no meter installed. Corruption suspected.
Sigra market ke paas footpath broken hai. Log road pe chalte hain, accident ka khatra hai.
Broken footpath near Sigra market forces pedestrians onto the main road.
Pandeypur school mein blackboard nahi hai theek se. Bacche padh nahi paate.
Blackboards in Pandeypur school are broken. Students cannot read what is written.
Paharia PHC mein laboratory nahi hai. Blood test ke liye private lab jaana padta hai.
No laboratory facility at Paharia PHC. Patients pay for private blood tests.
Orderly bazaar ke road mein potholes ki wajah se ambulance late ho jaati hai.
Potholes on Orderly Bazaar road delay ambulance response. Lives at risk.
Bhelupur mein baarish ke baad 5 din tak sadak par paani jama raha.
Water remained on Bhelupur road for 5 days after rain. Drainage completely failed.
Sigra school mein computer class nahi hoti. Digital education ki koi suvidha nahi.
No digital education facility at Sigra school. Children lack basic computer skills.
Shivpur mein bijli ka transformer kharaab ho gaya hai. Ek hafte se bijli nahi.
Transformer failure in Shivpur Ward 18. One week without electricity. No repair team.
Pandeypur mein sewer aur rain water ek hi naali mein aata hai. Bahut gandgi hai.
Combined sewer and rainwater drain in Pandeypur causing severe sanitation issues.
Chetganj mein ek bhi public toilet nahi hai. Khuli jagah par log hazat kar rahe hain.
No public toilet in Chetganj Ward 15. Open defecation observed. Immediate need.
Lohta mein road ki halat bahut buri hai. Godam tak truck nahi pahunch pata.
Lohta road condition prevents goods trucks from reaching warehouses. Business suffers.
Bhelupur mein anganwadi center ka darwaza toot gaya hai. Suraksha ka sawal hai.
Door of Bhelupur anganwadi is broken. Security risk for children inside.
Nadesar area mein ek anganwadi center ke paas paani nahi hai.
Anganwadi near Nadesar has no water supply. Hygiene conditions are alarming.
Paharia mein sarkari school ki buildings kharaab hain. State board ne notice diya hai.
State board issued notice to government school in Paharia for poor building condition.
Sigra marg par ek temporary puliya bani thi jo baarish mein toot gayi.
Temporary culvert on Sigra Marg collapsed during rains. Road now completely blocked.
Orderly bazaar mein bijli ka meter jameen par rakha hai, barish mein khatre mein hai.
Electricity meter placed on ground in Orderly Bazaar. Flood water enters meter box.
Bhelupur mein ek buzurga aadmi baarish mein na nikal saka, ghutna ki takleef mein zyada dard hua.
Elderly man in Bhelupur couldn't access medical help during flood. Mobility issues worsened.
Pandeypur mein ek aisa area hai jahan raat ko bilkul andhera rehta hai.
Entire lane in Pandeypur has no street lighting. Complete darkness every night.
Kabirchaura mein school ke paas ki road mein potholes hain. Bacchon ko school jaane mein takleef hoti hai.
Potholes near school in Kabirchaura. Children risk injury walking to school.
Sigra ward mein midday meal ka khaana bahut kharaab quality ka aata hai.
Mid-day meal quality in Sigra ward school is very poor. Stale and uncooked food served.
Shivpur mein ek chota sa nala ghar ke paas bahut zyada badbu deta hai.
Small drain near homes in Shivpur emits terrible smell. Needs urgent desilting.
Pandeypur mein ek anganwadi karyakarta ka transfer ho gaya, replacement nahi aayi.
Pandeypur anganwadi worker transferred. No replacement assigned. Center non-functional.
Bhelupur mein school ke chhaat se pani aata hai aur bacche beemar pad jaate hain.
Children falling sick at Bhelupur school due to rainwater entering through roof.
Shivpur mein road par koi speed breaker nahi hai. Speed se bahut accidents ho rahe hain.
No speed breakers on Shivpur road. Speeding vehicles causing frequent accidents.
Chetganj ke anganwadi mein khatam ho gaya hai poshan ration. Teen mahine se supply nahi.
Nutrition ration exhausted at Chetganj anganwadi. No supply replenishment for 3 months.
Orderly Bazaar mein sewer line ka paani sadak par aata hai. Bahut durgandhi hai.
Sewage coming onto road from broken sewer line in Orderly Bazaar. Very unhygienic.
Paharia mein ek buzurgi ko dialysis ke liye BHU tak do ghante safar karna padta hai.
Dialysis patient in Paharia travels 2 hours to BHU. Local health facility is inadequate.
Lohta mein community meeting ke liye koi jagah nahi. Community hall ka hall chhhota hai.
Lohta community has no meeting space. Community hall is too small and in poor condition.
Sigra mein ward ka kachra uthane wali gaadi roz nahi aati. Har jagah kachra phela hai.
Garbage collection in Sigra Ward 4 is irregular. Waste scattered everywhere.
Bhelupur mein paani ki supply line bahut purani hai, baar baar toot jaati hai.
Old water supply pipeline in Bhelupur bursts repeatedly. Continuous repair cycle.
Nadesar mein park unkempt hai. Bacche safe nahi feel karte wahan.
Nadesar park poorly maintained. Children do not feel safe playing there.
Paharia mein anganwadi mein pregnant women ko sahi poshan nahi milta.
Pregnant women in Paharia not receiving proper nutrition at anganwadi.
Sigra road ki problem se mere dono tyre kharaab ho gaye. Kaafi paisa waste hua.
Two tyres damaged due to Sigra road potholes. Residents spending extra on vehicle repairs.
Bhelupur mein pehle waali naali pak thi ab bilkul kharaab hai.
Bhelupur drain was functional earlier but now completely collapsed. Urgent reconstruction needed.
Chetganj mein school ke samne road ka pothole bahut khatra paida kar raha hai.
Dangerous pothole in front of Chetganj school. Children at risk crossing road.
Orderly bazaar PHC nahi hai. Sadar Bazaar tak jaana padta hai.
No PHC in Orderly Bazaar area. Patients must travel to Sadar Bazaar for treatment.
Pandeypur mein bijli ka bill bahut zyada aa raha hai bina wajah ke.
Unexplained high electricity bills in Pandeypur. Residents suspect meter tampering.
Shivpur mein parks ka renovation bahut zarori hai. Puraane jhule toot gaye hain.
Playground equipment in Shivpur park broken and rusted. Urgent renovation needed.
Bhelupur mein market ke paas road pe gutter nahi hai. Baarish mein pura paani sadak par aata hai.
No road gutter near Bhelupur market. Rainwater accumulates on road endangering shoppers.
Sigra school mein chemistry lab nahi hai. Practical karwana mushkil hai.
No chemistry or science lab in Sigra school. Practical education impossible.
Paharia aur shivpur ke beech ka bridge kharaab hai. Bahut khatra hai.
Bridge connecting Paharia and Shivpur is in dangerous condition. Structural assessment needed.
Nadesar colony mein mosquito fogging nahi hui iss saal. Dengue ka darr hai.
No mosquito fogging done in Nadesar colony this year. Dengue risk very high.
Chetganj mein CCTV camera laga hona chahiye, bahut crime ho raha hai.
CCTV cameras needed urgently in Chetganj. Crime rate has doubled in 6 months.
Ward 7 mein anganwadi center ka bathroom toot gaya hai. Karyakarta bahar jaati hai.
Anganwadi bathroom broken in Ward 7. Staff using open area. Dignity issue.
Pandeypur mein community hall ka renovation kai saal se pending hai.
Community hall renovation in Pandeypur pending for years. Needs urgent sanctioning.
Sigra market ke paas naali bahut chhhoti hai aur jam jaati hai.
Narrow drain near Sigra market gets blocked frequently causing street flooding.
Bhelupur mein kisi ki bhi sunte nahi hain neta. Complaint karo toh kuch nahi hota.
Bhelupur residents feel unheard. Multiple complaints about drainage filed with no response.
Paharia mein road ke kinare kachra jama ho gaya hai, mahine se nahi utha.
Garbage accumulated on roadside in Paharia for over a month. Health hazard.
Orderly bazaar mein public nala bahut bura hai. Monsoon mein overflow ho jaata hai.
Public drain in Orderly Bazaar overflows every monsoon. Long-term fix needed.
Sigra school mein saal bhar se science teacher nahi hai. Bacche practical miss kar rahe hain.
No science teacher in Sigra school for one year. Students missing entire curriculum.
Shivpur mein municipality ne nai nali banai par pani nahi nikalta usse bhi.
New drain constructed in Shivpur by municipality but still doesn't drain properly.
Chetganj mein PHC ka staff bahut rude hai. Log aana band kar dete hain.
PHC staff in Chetganj area behave rudely with patients. Attendance has dropped.
Pandeypur ke park mein baithne ki jagah aur path nahi hai. Barish mein keechad ho jaata hai.
No paved path in Pandeypur park. Mud everywhere during rains. Renovation needed.
Lohta mein school ke paas ek kachra dher bana hua hai jo mahine se nahi safa.
Garbage dump near school in Lohta not cleared for months. Health risk for students.
Sigra ward 4 mein raat ko mahilaaon ka bahar nikalna mushkil hai, andhaira hai.
Women in Sigra Ward 4 feel unsafe going out at night due to no street lighting.
Bhelupur mein baarish ke baad mosquito bahut zyada ho jaate hain.
Mosquito population explosion in Bhelupur after rains. Fogging and larvicide needed.
Orderly Bazaar mein ek bujurga ne raat mein ek baadh aadmi ko dekha. Koi police nahi.
Suspicious person spotted by elderly resident in Orderly Bazaar at night. No police response.
Nadesar mein bijli ki wire khule mein latki hai. Koi bhi chhu sake aur accident ho jaaye.
Exposed electrical wire hanging in Nadesar area. Electrocution risk for passersby.
Pandeypur mein ek purana sarkari building hai jo hazardous hai. Demolish karna chahiye.
Old government building in Pandeypur is structurally unsafe. Needs demolition or repair.
Paharia mein ek anganwadi mein chair-mez kharaab hain. Mahilayen zameen par baithti hain.
Furniture broken in Paharia anganwadi. Pregnant women sitting on floor.
Sigra marg mein road ka kaam baarish mein bhi kiya. Kharaab kaam hua. Dobara bigad gaya.
Road repair on Sigra Marg done during rains - poor quality work. Road damaged again.
Bhelupur mein flood se log apna ghar chhod ke rahe hain.
Families in Bhelupur displaced due to flooding. They need immediate relief and drainage fix.
Shivpur mein hospital tak jaane wali sadak puri baarish mein band ho jaati hai.
Road to hospital in Shivpur completely blocked during monsoon. Medical emergencies critical.
Kabirchaura mein sewer overflow ho raha hai. Mahila aur bachche pareshan hain.
Sewer overflow in Kabirchaura area. Women and children especially affected.
Orderly Bazaar mein school ke road par traffic jam hota hai. Bacchon ko danger hota hai.
Traffic jam near school in Orderly Bazaar puts children at risk during school hours.
Sigra school mein 5 saal se toilet ka renovation nahi hua.
Sigra school toilets not renovated in 5 years. Unusable for students.
Pandeypur mein paani ki pipe phat jaati hai baar baar. Nai pipe ki zaroorat hai.
Water pipe bursts frequently in Pandeypur. New pipeline installation needed urgently.
Bhelupur mein anganwadi worker ko teen mahine se salary nahi mili. Kaam chhod rahi hai.
Bhelupur anganwadi worker not paid salary for 3 months. Planning to quit.
Paharia mein road ke ek taraf pakka road hai lekin doosri taraf kacchi hai.
Paharia road is paved only on one side. Other side is muddy and unusable during rains.
Chetganj mein school ke paas traffic warden nahi hai. Bacchon ke saath accident ka darr.
No traffic warden near Chetganj school. Children cross dangerous road without safety.
Nadesar mein bijli ki supply unsteady rehti hai. Voltage fluctuation se appliances kharaab.
Voltage fluctuation in Nadesar area damaging household appliances. Stable supply needed.
Shivpur mein gali ki buri haalat hai, teen log gir kar zakhmi ho gaye is mahine.
3 people injured on broken lane in Shivpur this month. Urgent road repair needed.
Pandeypur mein mahilaaon ke liye bhi ek anganwadi hona chahiye, koi nahi hai yahan.
Pandeypur lacks a proper anganwadi center. Women and children underserved.
Orderly Bazaar mein paani ki kami hai, ek ward mein sirf ek nala hai.
Water shortage in Orderly Bazaar area. Only one functioning water connection for whole block.
Sigra mein school ki boundary wall toot gayi hai. Baahar se log andar aa jaate hain.
Boundary wall of Sigra school broken. Outsiders entering school premises freely.
Bhelupur mein road poori baarish mein doob jaati hai. School band ho jaata hai.
Road to Bhelupur school submerged during rains. School has to be closed frequently.
Chetganj mein puraane ghar toote hue hain, municipality ne notice nahi diya.
Old dilapidated houses in Chetganj ignored by municipality. Structural safety risk.
Paharia mein sarkari kaam mein bhrashtachar hai. Paisa kahan gaya nali ka?
Corruption alleged in Paharia drain project. Money sanctioned but drain not built.
Sigra ward 4 mein park nahi hai koi. Bacche sadak par khelte hain.
No park in Sigra Ward 4. Children forced to play on busy roads.
Bhelupur mein bijli ka meter teen mahine se kharaab hai. Company nahi aa rahi.
Electricity meter in Bhelupur malfunctioning for 3 months. Electricity company unresponsive.
Pandeypur mein anganwadi karyakarta ke paas bicycle tak nahi, home visit nahi kar pati.
Pandeypur anganwadi worker has no transport. Unable to do home visits to beneficiaries.
Nadesar ke school mein bhi overcrowding hai, 500 bacche 350 capacity school mein hain.
Nadesar school also overcrowded - 500 students for 350 capacity. Need expansion.
Shivpur mein ek bada talab hai jo bahut gandhila ho gaya hai. Macchar ka ghar ban gaya hai.
Large pond in Shivpur has become a mosquito breeding ground. Health emergency.
Orderly Bazaar mein peeney ka paani kai dino se band hai. Tanker bhi nahi aaya.
Drinking water supply cut off in Orderly Bazaar for several days. No tanker supply.
Sigra marg ka accident ek aur bar hua. Kisi ki bike ka tyre phat gaya gadde mein.
Another accident on Sigra Marg. Tyre burst in pothole. Rider hospitalized.
Bhelupur school mein saal ka pehla din hi baarish ke kaaran andar paani bhara.
On the very first day of school in Bhelupur, classrooms flooded due to roof leak.
Pandeypur mein road mein ek bada gadda hai bilkul school ke samne. Bahut khatarnaak.
Huge pothole directly in front of Pandeypur school gates. Student safety risk.
Paharia PHC mein mahilaon ke liye alag room nahi hai. Privacy nahi milti.
No separate room for women patients at Paharia PHC. Serious privacy and dignity issue.
Sigra mein road repair ke liye kai baar darkhwast ki. Sab ignore karte hain.
Multiple requests for road repair in Sigra have been ignored by authorities.
Bhelupur mein naali ki andari deewar toot gayi hai. Leakage ho raha hai ghar ke neeche.
Internal drain wall collapsed in Bhelupur. Seepage causing foundation damage to houses.
Shivpur mein anganwadi center ki machine kharaab hai. Bacchon ka poshan scale nahi ho raha.
Weighing machine broken at Shivpur anganwadi. Children's nutrition monitoring has stopped.
Chetganj mein park ka renovation kar do please. Bacche khel nahi sakte.
Chetganj park needs urgent renovation. Current state prevents children from playing safely.
Orderly Bazaar mein school ki safai nahi hoti. Classroom mein keechad rehta hai.
Orderly Bazaar school not cleaned regularly. Mud and dirt in classrooms.
Sigra marg par ek truck phas gaya gadde mein. Rasta band ho gaya tha.
Truck got stuck in Sigra Marg pothole. Road completely blocked for 2 hours.
Paharia ward ke logo ko paani ke liye 2 km door jaana padta hai. Suvidha nahi.
Paharia residents fetch water from 2km away. No nearby water supply point.
Bhelupur mein ek chota bacha drowning mein bachte bachte bachha. Naali mein gira tha.
Child nearly drowned after falling into open drain in Bhelupur. Drain cover needed urgently.
Nadesar mein school ke paas bade potholes hain. Bacche girr jaate hain.
Large potholes near Nadesar school. Children are tripping and falling.
Shivpur mein pahle se bani naali ko secon time repair karne ka kaam shuru kiya gaya.
Drain in Shivpur repaired just last year now being 'repaired again'. Corruption suspected.
Pandeypur mein bijli aur paani dono ki problem hai. Double takleef hai logo ko.
Pandeypur residents face both water and electricity problems simultaneously.
Sigra mein school mein ek bhi functional computer nahi hai.
No functional computer available at Sigra school. Digital divide is huge.
Bhelupur naali ka problem neta log chunaav ke waqt yaad karte hain, baad mein bhool jaate.
Bhelupur drain issue remembered only during elections, forgotten afterwards by politicians.
Paharia area mein naye log aaye hain, housing colony badhti ja rahi hai, suvidha nahi badhti.
Paharia housing colony growing rapidly but no infrastructure improvement.
Chetganj mein PHC ke paas ambulance parking ki jagah nahi hai.
No ambulance parking space near Chetganj PHC. Emergency response delayed.
Orderly Bazaar mein logo ka kachra koi nahi utha raha. Sadak par wapse gandgi ho gayi.
Garbage not collected from Orderly Bazaar for weeks. Roads covered in waste again.
Shivpur aur nadesar ke beech connectivity road kharaab hai. Long route lena padta hai.
Connecting road between Shivpur and Nadesar in poor condition. Residents take long detours.
Sigra school ke kuch bacche khane mein kaanch ki tareh cheez mili. Shikayat ki thi.
Foreign objects found in mid-day meal at Sigra school. Complaint filed but no inquiry.
Bhelupur mein anganwadi mein weighing scale nahi hai. Bachche ka weight track nahi hota.
No weighing scale at Bhelupur anganwadi. Malnutrition monitoring not possible.
Pandeypur mein ek sarkari bhumi par unauthorized construction ho gaya hai.
Unauthorized construction on government land in Pandeypur. Authorities ignoring complaints.
Sigra marg ke potholes bhar do. Kai saal se ek hi jagah gadda hai aur koi nahi sunta.
Same pothole on Sigra Marg for years. Fill it. Repeated requests completely ignored.
Nadesar mein bijli ke khambhe ke paas pani ruk jaata hai baarish mein. Khatarnaak hai.
Rainwater accumulates near electric pole in Nadesar. Electrocution hazard.
